---
title: "FB_ABT_unload_final_2025.12"
output: html_document
date: "2025-12-06"
---

# Legacy entrypoint

This file is retained as a compatibility entrypoint for readers who were previously directed to `FB_ABT_unload_final_2025.12.Rmd`.

Please use `nicu_exposures_representative_workflow.Rmd` as the primary public entrypoint for the representative workflow.

```{r}
primary_entrypoint <- if (file.exists("nicu_exposures_representative_workflow.Rmd")) {
  "nicu_exposures_representative_workflow.Rmd"
} else {
  file.path("code", "nicu_exposures_representative_workflow.Rmd")
}

message("Primary public entrypoint: ", primary_entrypoint)
```
